terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Text: By accessing or using the Kontraktor platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service, all applicable laws and regulations, and agree that you are responsible for compliance with any applicable local laws.
terms.section2Text: Kontraktor is a matching platform connecting project owners (clients) and verified professionals (contractors). We facilitate communication and bidding, but we do not employ contractors or take responsibility for the quality of the physical work performed.
terms.section3Text: When you create an account with us, you must provide information that is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Failure to do so constitutes a breach of the terms, which may result in immediate termination of your account.
terms.section4Text: In no event shall Kontraktor be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising out of or in connection with your use or inability to use our platform.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Text: We collect information you provide directly to us when registering, posting projects, or communicating with other users. This includes your name, email address, phone number, profile photo, and project details.
privacy.section2Text: We use the collected information to provide, maintain, and improve the Kontraktor platform. We also use it to connect clients with contractors, process payments, and verify professional profiles.
privacy.section3Text: The security of your personal data is highly important to us. We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, disclosure, or modification.
privacy.section4Text: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information at any time through your account settings or by contacting our support team.
